full_text:
King Shamoke 沙摩柯大王
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
King Shamoke (沙摩柯大王). Originally a tribal leader, he helped Liu Bei at Yiling but died fighting Wu. King Shamoke was affiliated with Qiang and the Shu Kingdom. King Shamoke lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
